# Find the Right Skill

<!-- Auto-generated from rankings.json — do not edit manually -->

Start with your situation. Find the phase you're in, then the problem you're facing.

## Phases

- [Validate Your Idea](#1-validate) (4 scenarios)
- [Build Your Product](#2-build) (10 scenarios)
- [Ship & Deploy](#3-ship) (12 scenarios)
- [Get Found](#4-get-found) (11 scenarios)
- [Get Customers](#5-acquire) (7 scenarios)
- [Convert Visitors](#6-convert) (8 scenarios)
- [Retain & Grow](#7-retain) (3 scenarios)
- [Power Tools](#8-power-tools) (8 scenarios)

---

## Validate Your Idea

> **"I have an idea but don't know if anyone would pay for it"**
>
> Unvalidated idea, risk of building something nobody wants
>
> Use: `office-hours` 📋 | `brainstorming` 📋

> **"I don't know who my target customer is or how to describe my product"**
>
> Unclear positioning, ICP, or value proposition
>
> Use: `product-marketing-context` 📋

> **"I have a plan but I'm not sure if the scope is right"**
>
> Scope uncertainty — too ambitious or not ambitious enough
>
> Use: `plan-ceo-review` 📋

> **"I need to understand the competitive landscape"**
>
> Don't know how competitors position or what alternatives exist
>
> Use: `competitor-alternatives` 📋

---

## Build Your Product

> **"I have requirements but need to plan the implementation"**
>
> Complex task that needs breaking down before writing code
>
> Use: `writing-plans` 📋 | `executing-plans` 📋

> **"I need to build a frontend that looks professional"**
>
> Need production-grade UI, not generic AI-looking output
>
> Use: `frontend-design` 📋 | `design-consultation` 📋

> **"I want someone to check my architecture before I build"**
>
> Risk of structural issues, wrong patterns, or missed edge cases
>
> Use: `plan-eng-review` 📋 | `plan-design-review` 📋

> **"I have a bug and I don't know why"**
>
> Unexpected behavior, test failures, or errors
>
> Use: `investigate` 📋

> **"I want to implement a feature with proper test coverage"**
>
> Need confidence that new code works and doesn't break existing code
>
> Use: `test-driven-development` 📋

> **"I have multiple independent tasks to do at once"**
>
> Sequential work is too slow, tasks don't depend on each other
>
> Use: `subagent-driven-development` 📋

> **"I got code review feedback and I'm not sure I agree with all of it"**
>
> Need to evaluate feedback critically, not just accept blindly
>
> Use: `receiving-code-review` 📋

> **"I want to work on a feature without affecting the main branch"**
>
> Need isolation for risky or long-running changes
>
> Use: `using-git-worktrees` 📋

> **"I want to create a reusable skill for my own workflow"**
>
> Repetitive workflow that should be automated as a skill
>
> Use: `writing-skills` 📋

> **"I want another AI to review or challenge my code"**
>
> Need an independent perspective on code quality
>
> Use: `codex` 📋

---

## Ship & Deploy

> **"My code is ready, I want to create a PR and ship it"**
>
> Need full ship workflow: tests, review, version bump, PR
>
> Use: `ship` 📋

> **"I want to review the diff before landing this PR"**
>
> Need to catch security issues, side effects, or structural problems
>
> Use: `review` 📋

> **"PR is approved, I want to merge and verify production"**
>
> Need to merge, wait for CI, and confirm production health
>
> Use: `land-and-deploy` 📋 | `setup-deploy` 📋

> **"I need to QA test my app and fix bugs"**
>
> Don't know if the app works correctly end-to-end
>
> Use: `qa` 📋 | `qa-only` 📋 | `browse` ⭐

> **"I need to test pages that require login"**
>
> Headless browser doesn't have my session/cookies
>
> Use: `setup-browser-cookies` 📋 | `browse` ⭐

> **"The app works but the design looks off"**
>
> Spacing, alignment, hierarchy, or consistency issues
>
> Use: `design-review` 📋

> **"I want to make sure my changes didn't slow things down"**
>
> Need before/after performance comparison
>
> Use: `benchmark` 📋

> **"I just deployed, I want to watch for errors"**
>
> Need to catch post-deploy regressions quickly
>
> Use: `canary` 📋

> **"I shipped a feature, now docs are outdated"**
>
> README, CHANGELOG, and other docs don't match what shipped
>
> Use: `document-release` 📋

> **"What did we ship this week? What went well?"**
>
> Need structured retrospective with data
>
> Use: `retro` 📋

> **"I'm touching production systems and don't want to break anything"**
>
> Risk of destructive commands or accidental changes
>
> Use: `guard` 📋 | `careful` 📋

> **"I want to check my app for vulnerabilities before launch"**
>
> Need to find real security issues, not just theoretical ones
>
> Use: `shannon` 📋

---

## Get Found

> **"My site isn't showing up in Google search results"**
>
> Technical SEO issues, missing meta tags, or poor content
>
> Use: `seo-audit` 📝

> **"I want ChatGPT and Perplexity to mention my product"**
>
> Content isn't structured for AI citation or extraction
>
> Use: `ai-seo` 📝

> **"My search results don't show stars, FAQs, or other rich data"**
>
> Missing structured data / JSON-LD markup
>
> Use: `schema-markup` 📝

> **"I want to rank for hundreds of keywords at scale"**
>
> Can't manually create pages for every keyword variation
>
> Use: `programmatic-seo` 📝

> **"I'm building a new site and need to plan the page hierarchy"**
>
> Unclear navigation, URL structure, or internal linking
>
> Use: `site-architecture` 📝

> **"I need a content strategy but I don't know where to start"**
>
> No plan for what topics to cover or in what order
>
> Use: `content-strategy` 📝

> **"I need to write compelling copy for my website"**
>
> Blank page, weak headlines, unclear value proposition
>
> Use: `copywriting` 📝 | `copy-editing` 📝

> **"I need posts for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram"**
>
> Don't know what to post or how to repurpose content
>
> Use: `social-content` 📝

> **"I don't know how to market my product"**
>
> No marketing ideas, need inspiration
>
> Use: `marketing-ideas` 📝 | `marketing-psychology` 📝

> **"I'm about to launch and need a plan"**
>
> No launch strategy, don't know how to maximize impact
>
> Use: `launch-strategy` 📝

> **"I want to capture emails with free content or tools"**
>
> No lead magnets, gated content, or free tools
>
> Use: `lead-magnets` 📝 | `free-tool-strategy` 📝 | `popup-cro` 📝

---

## Get Customers

> **"I want to run Google or Facebook ads"**
>
> No ad strategy, targeting, or budget plan
>
> Use: `paid-ads` 📋 | `ad-creative` 📋

> **"I want to reach out to potential customers directly"**
>
> Cold emails that don't get replies
>
> Use: `cold-email` 📋

> **"I have leads but they're not converting to customers"**
>
> No email sequences to warm up and nurture leads
>
> Use: `email-sequence` 📋

> **"I want existing customers to bring me new ones"**
>
> No referral program or viral loop
>
> Use: `referral-program` 📋

> **"My sales team needs better materials"**
>
> No pitch decks, one-pagers, or objection handling docs
>
> Use: `sales-enablement` 📋

> **"Marketing generates leads but sales doesn't follow up"**
>
> No lead scoring, routing, or handoff process
>
> Use: `revops` 📋

> **"Prospects are comparing us to competitors"**
>
> No comparison pages or competitive positioning
>
> Use: `competitor-alternatives` 📋

---

## Convert Visitors

> **"People visit my page but don't sign up or buy"**
>
> Low conversion rate on landing/pricing/feature pages
>
> Use: `page-cro` 📋

> **"People start signing up but don't finish"**
>
> Friction in registration flow, too many steps or fields
>
> Use: `signup-flow-cro` 📋

> **"My lead capture or contact form has low completion"**
>
> Too many fields, confusing layout, or unclear value
>
> Use: `form-cro` 📋

> **"Free users aren't upgrading to paid"**
>
> Weak upgrade prompts, unclear value of paid tier
>
> Use: `paywall-upgrade-cro` 📋

> **"I don't know how to price my product"**
>
> Unclear pricing model, tiers, or willingness to pay
>
> Use: `pricing-strategy` 📋

> **"I changed something and want to know if it actually helped"**
>
> No A/B test framework or statistical rigor
>
> Use: `ab-test-setup` 📋

> **"I can't tell what users are doing on my site"**
>
> No analytics, event tracking, or conversion measurement
>
> Use: `analytics-tracking` 📋

> **"People create accounts but never come back"**
>
> No onboarding flow, users don't reach the aha moment
>
> Use: `onboarding-cro` 📋

---

## Retain & Grow

> **"People keep canceling their subscriptions"**
>
> No save offers, exit surveys, or win-back flows
>
> Use: `churn-prevention` 📝

> **"Active users are becoming inactive over time"**
>
> No re-engagement emails or lifecycle communication
>
> Use: `email-sequence` 📋

> **"Revenue isn't growing even though users are growing"**
>
> Wrong pricing, packaging, or value metric
>
> Use: `pricing-strategy` 📋

---

## Power Tools

> **"I need a production-ready prompt for a specific role or task"**
>
> Writing good prompts from scratch is slow and inconsistent
>
> Use: `prompt-factory` 📋

> **"I want to build a custom AI agent for my workflow"**
>
> Need structured agent with proper tools and MCP integration
>
> Use: `agent-factory` 📋

> **"I want a custom slash command for a repeated workflow"**
>
> Doing the same multi-step task manually every time
>
> Use: `slash-command-factory` 📋

> **"I want Claude Code to automatically do something on events"**
>
> Need automated behaviors tied to tool calls or file changes
>
> Use: `hook-factory` 📋

> **"I want to install, update, or remove skills"**
>
> Need to manage the amazing_cc_skills collection
>
> Use: `manage-skills` 📋

> **"I need to create, read, or edit PDF/Word/PowerPoint/Excel files"**
>
> Need to process office documents programmatically
>
> Use: `pdf` 📋 | `docx` 📋 | `pptx` 📋 | `xlsx` 📋

> **"I need source-grounded answers or real-time search"**
>
> Need citations from documents or live web/academic data
>
> Use: `notebooklm` 📋 | `valyu-best-practices` 📋

> **"I want to restrict edits to one folder while debugging"**
>
> Risk of accidentally changing unrelated code
>
> Use: `freeze` 📋 | `unfreeze` 📋

---
